raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What’s on your mind","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Test set context before the check-in gets specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hidden drag","name":"What’s taking more effort than it should right now?","description":"Surfaces friction the intro blocker scan may not catch, especially around load or process.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Waiting on others","name":"What are you waiting on that could quietly stall you?","description":"Gets at dependencies and hidden delay without using generic blocker language.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stakeholder visibility","name":"Who needs a clearer read on where things stand?","description":"Probes communication habits and whether anyone is under-informed on status or risk.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff call","name":"What are you choosing not to do this fortnight?","description":"Surfaces prioritisation tradeoffs and what is being consciously left out.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work that moves","name":"Which piece of work feels like the best use of your time right now?","description":"Checks whether the current shape of work matches where Test wants to invest effort.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Early slippage","name":"Where do you see something slipping before it becomes a problem?","description":"Tests reliability and whether Test is spotting risk early enough to protect the plan.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Status handoff","name":"What would make your next update easier to give?","description":"Looks for practical changes that would improve communication and reduce reporting friction.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes on concrete support or adjustments that would improve the coming stretch.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
